arts.sum: The match sees eleventh take on first in the table, and with both sides having lost last time out in the league, there will be an eagerness to return to winning ways before the upcoming international break. Time for another league game as FC Barcelona travel for to Vitoria to fulfil their LaLiga gameweek 9 fixture against Alavés.

arts.ttl: Barcelona make €7m saving as former player’s unfair dismissal appeal rejected by Supreme Court
arts.sum: Over the last three years, Barcelona have been embroiled in a legal battle with their former player, Matheus Fernandes. The 26-year-old signed in January 2020, but after failing to make any impact in Catalonia, this contract was terminated 18 months later, with the club stating that he did not have “the physical, technical level and […] The post Barcelona make €7m saving as former player’s unfair dismissal appeal rejected by Supreme Court appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano reveals state of play on Erling Haaland to Barcelona
arts.sum: “ Erling Haaland – Barcelona have been linked with Manchester City ’s star player in the Spanish press, but my honest feeling is that predicting what Barca will do now for summer 2025 would be completely made up stuff,” Romano said. Erling Haaland has been heavily linked with a summer move to Barcelona in 2025, but Fabrizio Romano has called for calm.

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Alaves-Barcelona: Unchanged line-up planned by Hansi Flick
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s victory over Villarreal on Saturday has seen them draw level on points with Barcelona at the top of La Liga. The Catalans can re-establish their three-point lead on Sunday afternoon when they make the trip to Alaves for their MD9 fixture. For head coach Hansi Flick, it will be a fairly simple turnaround […] The post Predicted Teams Alaves-Barcelona: Unchanged line-up planned by Hansi Flick appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Financial Fair Play could be key as Barcelona linked with stunning Erling Haaland transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland has been linked with Barcelona as a top target for summer 2025, but Fabrizio Romano has called for calm amid all the latest transfer speculation. Speaking exclusively to CaughtOffside for the latest edition of his Daily Briefing column, Romano discussed Haaland’s future, insisting that nothing would be decided now as […] The post Financial Fair Play could be key as Barcelona linked with stunning Erling Haaland transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Sunday's La Liga predictions including Alaves vs. Barcelona
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's La Liga fixtures, including Alaves vs. Barcelona.

RB: Jules Kounde - Despite a flurry of injuries across Barca's squad, Kounde has proved a reliable provider at right-back so far this season. The Catalan giants have made a remarkable start to the Hansi Flick era and have won seven of their opening eight matches in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Barcelona, Atletico Madrid 'battling for £42m Arsenal star' amid contract uncertainty
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid reportedly show an interest in re-signing Thomas Partey from Arsenal next summer but face competition from Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Nico quizzed on his future again amid continued Barca talk
arts.sum: Nico Williams has been asked about his future at Athletic Club after a summer which saw him heavily linked with a move to Barcelona. Williams has been asked about his future in a new interview with AS and was quizzed specifically on the fact that he has previously said he’d decided to stay for the rest of the year.

Barcelona are growing 'concerned' about Vitor Roque's performances at Real Betis, according to Spanish media. The German was open to keeping Roque around, but Barcelona's financial situation made it necessary to shift bodies and the 19-year-old was loaned to Real Betis, with the Seville-based club boasting a €25 million purchase option.
